description: A tenant's agent must compare two different lease proposals by calculating the Net Effective Rent for each.

nodes.task_description: Gather the terms for each proposal, including the base rent, term length, free rent period, and tenant improvement allowance.

expected_outcome.value: Agent has all the necessary variables for the calculation.

nodes.task_description: For each proposal, calculate the total value of all concessions (free rent + TI allowance).

expected_outcome.value: The total value of concessions is accurately calculated.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the Net Effective Rent per square foot, which represents the true economic value of the lease, and advise the tenant on which proposal is financially better.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a clear, apples-to-apples comparison of the two proposals.
